contexts.context: ...too many of our youthful aristocracy begin life with <mark>self-sufficiency</mark> for knowledge, prejudices for opinions, and with...
...of frigid indifference, or the contemptuous sneer of <mark>self-sufficient</mark> folly. The collector of shells and the anatomist...
...appear to Irony herself, with all her pride and <mark>self-sufficiency</mark>, a subject rather of regret than of compassion...
